overview: Demon Berserker is a SubBoss-class Demon monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 800 HP, 23 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed -100. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 7 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack3From Idle at 190% ratio (437 base damage). Sight range 950, combat radius 160.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 7 melee attacks. Attack1From Idle (160%), Attack2From Idle (160%), Attack3From Idle (190%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 950 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 950 units, loses target at 1400 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 160, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 160. Ability check distance 200. Ability attack delay: 0.75s.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 950 units. Loses target at 1400 units.
